{{Quote|Eight-eight-six-seven through Eight-eight-six-nine, affix grapples and follow me. Everybody else prepare for covering fire.|Commander Cody gives "A" Squad, including Eight-eight-six-eight, orders|<ref name="Routine Valor" />}}
'''Eight-eight-six-eight''' was a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] that served as part of the [[212th Attack Battalion/Legends|212 Attack Battalion's]] [["A" Squad]] during the [[Battle of Sarrish/Legends|Battle of Sarrish]]. Alongside [[Clone Marshal Commander|Marshal Commander]] [[Cody/Legends|Cody]], [[Eight-eight-six-seven]], and [[Eight-eight-six-nine]], Eight-eight-six-eight attempted to climb a [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] utilizing an [[Ascension cable/Legends|ascension cable]], only to be killed in the process; of the group's members, only Cody survived.<ref name="Routine Valor" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Eight-eight-six-eight was created by writer [[Randy Stradley]] and penciler and inker [[Douglas Wheatley]], first appearing in the comic ''[[Routine Valor]]'',<ref name="Routine Valor" /> released on [[May 6]], [[2006]] in celebration of [[Wikipedia:Free Comic Book Day|Free Comic Book Day]].<ref name="FreeComic">{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/13-848/Free-Comic-Book-Day-2006-Star-Wars-Conan-Split-Issue|text=FREE COMIC BOOK DAY 2006 STAR WARS/CONAN SPLIT ISSUE}}</ref>
